summary: All 8 requested bug fixes tested and verified. Search autocomplete correctly filters out locations/places/countries for 'leonard', 'georgia', 'florence', and 'victoria' queries. Hot Celebs shows correct dynamic prices matching tier ranges (A-list £9-12M, B-list £5-8M, C-list £2-4M, D-list £0.5-1.5M). Hot Celebs randomizes on page refresh. How It Works section has explainer text below icons. Green price text in Hot Celebs is smaller (text-[8px]).
passed_tests: Search 'leonard' returns only people (Kawhi Leonard, Leonard Cohen, Leonard Nimoy, Sugar Ray Leonard, Leonard Bernstein) - NO locations
Search 'georgia' returns only celebrities (Georgia O'Keeffe, Georgia Holt, Georgia Tennant, Georgia May Jagger, Georgia Toffolo) - NO places/universities
Search 'florence' returns only people (Florence Welch, Florence Nightingale, Florence Hunt, Florence Pugh, Florence Price) - NO prisons
Search 'victoria' returns only people (Queen Victoria, Victoria Beckham, Victoria Starmer, Victoria Justice, Victoria Mboko) - NO awards
Hot Celebs endpoint returns 8 celebrities with correct data
Hot Celebs prices match tier ranges: A-list £9-12M, B-list £5-8M, C-list £2-4M, D-list £0.5-1.5M
Hot Celebs randomizes on page refresh (verified with 3 refreshes)
Hot Celebs has required fields (name, tier, price, image)
Pricing endpoint returns correct tier ranges
Trending ticker shows correct prices matching tiers

How It Works section has explainer text: 'Search for any celebrity • Prices range from £0.5m-£12m based on tier & buzz • Draft a team of 10 with your £50M budget • Transfer window opens Sat 12pm GMT • Earn +100 bonus if a celeb passes away'
Hot Celebs banner price text uses text-[8px] class (smaller green text)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 bug fixes from iteration 10 verified: (1) Search 'leonard' returns only people, no locations. (2) Search 'georgia' returns only celebrities, no places/universities. (3) Search 'florence' returns only people, no prisons. (4) Search 'victoria' returns only people, no awards. (5) Hot Celebs shows correct dynamic prices based on tier (A £9-12M, B £5-8M, C £2-4M, D £0.5-1.5M). (6) Hot Celebs randomizes on page refresh. (7) How It Works has explainer text below icons. (8) Hot Celebs price text is smaller (text-[8px]).
